description_long: This community center is a single-story, modern structure surrounded by a dense perimeter of trees and flowering shrubs, creating a secluded and inviting environment. The building features a flat, dark gray roof and a large glass facade facing the main road, with multiple entry points and wide windows that allow natural light to flood the interior. A spacious courtyard with a rectangular swimming pool is located at the rear, bordered by manicured lawns and additional landscaping. The property is enclosed by a white picket fence along the street side, with a driveway and parking area directly accessible from the road. Several cars are parked or driving along the adjacent street, emphasizing the urban context. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on accessibility, open space, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story community center with a flat roof, glass facade, and a landscaped courtyard featuring a swimming pool, surrounded by trees and a white picket fence.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the community center, highlighting the swimming pool, landscaped courtyard, and dense tree border.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with large glass windows, the main entrance, driveway, and street with parked cars.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the building from the opposite side, emphasizing the roof, tree-lined perimeter, and partial view of the courtyard.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back of the property, showing the tree enclosure and a glimpse of the pool and garden area.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is visible on the front facade, consisting of wide glass doors integrated into a large glass wall, with a driveway and sidewalk providing direct access. The entrance is at ground level, suggesting step-free access, and is architecturally integrated with the modern, minimalist design of the building. No additional decorative or functional elements such as canopies or ramps are visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with a flat roof, large glass windows, minimal ornamentation, and a strong emphasis on integration with landscaped outdoor spaces.
